home.tagline: Collect and send money instantly. No bank. No hidden fees.
home.cobrar_sub: Generate a link and share it with your customer
home.cobrar_tag: Money goes directly to your card
home.remesa_sub: Transfer to anywhere in the world
home.trust_no_storage: No database. No storage. Just you and your customer.
home.trust_instant: Instant payments via Visa / Mastercard network

cobrar.title: Collect payment
cobrar.setup_hint: Only done once. Stripe will verify your identity to deposit to your card.
cobrar.share_message: Payment of {amount} to {merchant}. Tap the link to pay:
cobrar.error_generic: Error generating the charge. Please try again.

pagar.your_card_label: Your debit card (to receive the money)
pagar.card_hint: 16 digits of your Visa or Mastercard debit card
pagar.stripe_trust: Secure payment by Stripe. Your card data never touches OmniPay.
pagar.card_trust: Funds are deposited directly to your card. Single-use link.
pagar.stripe_redirect_note: You'll be redirected to Stripe to enter your card
pagar.instant_note: The deposit will arrive in seconds to your card
pagar.expired_link: This link has expired (10 min). Ask for a new one.
pagar.processing_note: You'll receive an SMS when it credits

remesa.title: Send remittance
remesa.kyc_warning: Amounts over $1,000 may require identity verification from the provider. Have your official ID ready.
remesa.sender_card_hint: Enter your details to receive a receipt and charge your card
remesa.sender_card_hint2: 16 digits of your Visa or Mastercard debit card
remesa.recipient_hint: Who are you sending money to?
remesa.share_hint: Send this link to the recipient via WhatsApp:
remesa.share_message: Hi, I sent you {amount} ({dest}) via OmniPay. Open the link to receive money to your card (valid 10 min):
remesa.error_tokenize: Error processing your card. Check the details.
remesa.error_generic: Error generating the transfer. Please try again.

resultado.failed_sub: Check your details and try again.
resultado.receipt_invalid_sub: This receipt was tampered with or was not generated by OmniPay.
resultado.receipt_note: Authentic receipt. Contains no card or bank account data.
resultado.wise_eta_note: Transfer arrives in 1-2 business days. You will receive an SMS when it credits.
